title: Common AI Mistakes in OpenWrt Development
description: Documents seven recurring categories of era-mismatched or API-incorrect patterns that AI tools produce when generating OpenWrt code, with WRONG/CORRECT pairs for each.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing AI-generated OpenWrt code or prompting an AI tool, to check output against known failure categories.
verification_basis: Patterns sourced from procd, uci, ucode, and luci corpus review; swconfig/DSA distinction from wiki corpus; package path conventions from openwrt-core corpus
